package pages

type User {
  name: string
  active: bool
  nickname: string?
  profileURL: url
  tags: string[]
}

export component Profile(user: User): html {
<article hidden={not user.active} title={user.nickname}>
  <a href={user.profileURL}>{user.name}</a>
  {if user.active}
    <ul>{for tag, index in user.tags}<li data-index={index}>{tag}</li>{/for}</ul>
  {else}
    <p>inactive</p>
  {/if}
</article>
}
